videos.headline: Sam Leavitt muscles in for ASU TD
videos.description: Sam Leavitt scores on a 1-yard rush for Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt muscles in for ASU TD) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sawyer Robertson slings pass for Baylor TD
videos.description: Sawyer Robertson throws a 8-yard touchdown pass to Kole Wilson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sawyer Robertson slings pass for Baylor TD) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Trigg extends for Baylor TD
videos.description: Michael Trigg breaks the plane for a Baylor touchdown on a 1-yard pass from Sawyer Robertson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Trigg extends for Baylor TD) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Baylor ties the score late
videos.description: Sawyer Robertson finds Michael Trigg for a 33-yard Baylor touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Baylor ties the score late) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arizona State hits winning field goal as time expires
videos.description: Jesus Gomez sinks a 43-yard game-winning field goal for Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona State hits winning field goal as time expires) 2025/09/20 ESHEET
